title: Identification Cards * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Identification Cards * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues ntification Cards Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARC OF BENTON COUNTY COMMCARD PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a program meant to facilitate understanding and effective communication techniques between an individual with a developmental disability and another person. Assistance is given to acquire an identification card with information about a person's diagnosis, address, advocate contacts, behavioral presentations, communication accomodations, and a sample stress-diffusing topic. Applicants will be required to attend a training session to practice the process with uniformed helping professionals. 928 NW Beca Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 753-1711 3 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC OF BENTON COUNTY COMMCARD PROGRAM
